title: Integrate M3 ordinary life scenario
summary: Compose the focused M3 scenario so injury affects work, medical care, logistics, mood and relationships under day/night/weather.
acceptance: Focused scenario runs deterministically with the scenario id seed command stream and tick horizons defined by WM-0046
A single injury visibly affects work eligibility medical care logistics mood and at least one relationship through owner-state and structured reasons
Day/night and basic weather participate as deterministic context without M4 product systems
Scenario emits machine-checkable summary hashes reason traces queue metrics and terminal invariant counters
No implementation fix in this task bypasses upstream owner-store responsibilities or introduces global scans

history.details: Created by WM-0045 M3 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Create the first executable M3 ordinary-life vertical scenario after focused owner-store slices are reviewed.
forbiddenPaths: product behavior fixes to bypass upstream task defects
M4 lamp Chronicle anomaly crisis-chain or director implementation
benchmarkImpact: Establishes focused scenario metrics and hashes for later save/replay Worker parity and long-run benchmark tasks; no baseline update.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; qa-performance uses the verified scenario as input to WM-0059.
rollbackModel: Revert scenario integration code tests docs and report; leave upstream focused slices intact if independently verified.
ownerGate: Do not repair upstream architecture gaps inside scenario glue
Keep scenario small focused and machine-checkable
Emit structured reason and invariant counters
Block on Worker protocol save schema dependency UI authority or M4 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Scenario integration across deterministic simulation systems is not suitable for Spark.
